channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Johnny Manziel wants Drake on his new podcast and promises not to ask him about Kendrick Lamar beef
item.description: Johnny Manziel told Fox News Digital that Drake is the 'dream guest' for his new podcast as he looks to make a name for himself in the media industry.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA outlook is promising after record-setting year, although the league has a few challenges ahead
item.description: The WNBA outlook seems promising heading into the offseason following a banner season with record ratings, attendance and a first-time champion in New York.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Browns star Myles Garrett sticks up for embattled Deshaun Watson after QB's season-ending injury
item.description: Browns All-Pro defensive lineman Myles Garrett said injured quarterback Deshaun Watson does not deserve the hate he's received from fans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA likely to investigate 76ers as Joel Embiid begins season on bench with injury: report
item.description: The Philadelphia 76ers are expected to be the subject of an NBA investigation regarding All-Star Joel Embiid's player participation, as he will be missing nationally televised games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz players excited for season opener
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - There is nothing like opening night. Even though the Utah Jazz don't have the highest expectations this season, the players are literally jazzed up for the opener against Memphis.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hybricon Games enters third season
item.description: “Every year before the Hybricon Games, I’m like, ‘I’m never doing that again.’ But immediately after, I want more,” says Austen Alexander.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Shohei Ohtani’s 50/50 ball shatters record for most expensive in sports history
item.description: Ohtani became the first player in the sport’s history to hit 50 home runs and steal 50 bases in a season, doing so on Sept. 19 against the Miami Marlins.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers rookie Pearsall could have big role against Cowboys
item.description: Ricky Pearsall Jr. needed a day to recover from debut, but 49ers' rookie is ready to take on added responsibilities at receiver.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa practices for the first time since suffering a concussion in Week 2
item.description:
Tyreek Hill couldn't hide his excitement catching the football from Tua Tagovailoa on Wednesday for the first time in over a month.
Tagovailoa practiced Wednesday for the first time since suffering a concussion in Week 2, and the Dolphins (2-4) are aiming for him to start Sunday against Arizona.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: World Series ticket prices double those of last year
item.description: With New York and Los Angeles facing off in this year's World Series, it's not surprising that ticket prices could give some sticker shock. But even with that knowledge in mind, the Dodgers-Yankees matchup is bringing in some historic prices.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: How Fernando Valenzuela changed Los Angeles forever
item.description: The historic impact Fernando Valenzuela made on the city of Los Angeles traces its roots to the 1950s, according to renounced sports commentator Roy Firestone.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Fernando Valenzuela, Mexican-born pitcher whose feats for Dodgers fueled 'Fernandomania,' dies at 63
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fernando Valenzuela, the Mexican-born phenom for the Los Angeles Dodgers who inspired “Fernandomania” while winning the NL Cy Young Award and Rookie of the Year in 1981, has died. He was 63.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohtani's historic 50-50 ball sells at auction for nearly $4.4M amid ongoing dispute over ownership
item.description: Shohei Ohtani’s 50th home run ball has sold at auction for nearly $4.4 million, a record high price not just for a baseball, but for any ball in any sport, the auctioneer said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ottawa shuts out Utah Hockey Club, 4-0
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was an eight-minute blitz from which the Utah Hockey Club could not receover. Anton Forsberg made 31 saves, Drake Batherson scored his third goal in two games and the Ottawa Senators won their first road game of the season, 4-0 victory over Utah HC Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Flaherty to start World Series Game 1 for Dodgers - Rapid Reaction
item.description: LOS ANGELES - Game 1 of the World Series will have a SoCal feel. Not just because it will be played at Dodger Stadium, but both starting pitchers have area ties.
item.dc:creator: Rahshaun Haylock, KTLA 5

item.title: Stanley Cup champion Panthers and coach Paul Maurice agree on contract extension
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — The contract extension discussions between Paul Maurice and the Florida Panthers weren't exactly of the back-and-forth variety. “There was really no negotiation," Maurice said. "They made me a really nice offer and we shook hands and I said, ‘Thank you.’ And that was it.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jack Flaherty will start for Dodgers in World Series opener against Gerrit Cole and Yankees
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Jack Flaherty will start for the Los Angeles Dodgers in the World Series opener against the New York Yankees and Gerrit Cole on Friday night at Dodger Stadium in a matchup of area natives. Flaherty is from nearby Burbank and attended high school at Harvard-Westlake in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tickets now on sale for San Diego's 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: This will be San Diego's 73rd year hosting a PGA Tour event and the 58th time it's being held at Torrey Pines Golf Course.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: BUCS BONUS: Chris Godwin to undergo surgery, out for rest of regular season
item.description: Godwin, the league leader in receptions through the first seven weeks of the season, will likely miss the rest of the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Want to see the Dodgers in the World Series? Prepare for sticker shock
item.description: The Boys in Blue are back in the World Series, and the matchup with the New York Yankees is sure to draw a great deal of attention. If you want to catch a game in person, however, it will also cost you a great deal of cash.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers vs. Yankees in the World Series? It's more common than you think
item.description: The Fall Classic is set, and the matchup is a classic all right. The Los Angeles Dodgers clinched the National League pennant on Sunday, closing out the New York Mets in six games in the NL Championship Series. That means that baseball fans are getting a dream matchup in the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Andy Ludwig steps down as Utes offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Following another dismal offensive performance against TCU, Andy Ludwig has stepped down as Utah's offensive coordinator and quarterbacks coach. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham released a statement Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: SEC fines Tennessee $100,000 for rushing the field after win over Alabama
item.description: While Tennessee was fined $100,000 when fans rushed the field after beating Alabama in 2022, this penalty is the school's first violation since the policy was revised last year.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Raucoules, NewsNation

item.title: Cooper scores in his Bills debut and Allen shakes off a sluggish start in 34-10 rout of Titans
item.description: It didn’t take Amari Cooper long to get the hang of Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills' offense — even when the quarterback was changing plays at the line of scrimmage.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Santa Monica Ferris wheel to light up in support of Dodgers World Series push
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are knocking at the door of the World Series, and one of Los Angeles' most iconic landmarks will be decked out in blue to reflect the city's support.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies move to IMG Academy for final 2 regular-season games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rowdies will play their final two regular-season matches at IMG Academy due to the impacts of Hurricane Milton and Helene.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kucherov scores with 55 seconds left for 4-3 win over Vegas
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored the winning goal with less than a minute to play just 1:27 after Brandon Hagel had tied it and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Vegas Golden Knights 4-3 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
